siteDescription: Design and manufacture of CNC controllers, servo drives, and expansion boards in Vietnam. Direct support across 35 provinces, 24-month warranty.
defaultOgAlt: QS Technology — CNC Controllers Made in Vietnam
homeDescription: Six controller lines for milling, bending, dispensing, and jewelry — QS hardware, QS firmware, domestic technical support. Deployed on 800+ production lines across Vietnam.
productsDescription: Six controller lines for every machine configuration — from basic 3-axis milling to 6-axis industrial systems with touchscreen and EtherCAT.
newsDescription: Latest product releases, events, and technical updates from QS Technology.
applicationsDescription: QS controllers are running in a wide range of machine types — from metal milling to spring bending, adhesive dispensing, and food processing.
servicesDescription: PCB design, firmware development, and controller delivery to specification — a 100% fit for your production line.
